title: Dortmanna gracilis
intro: Dortmanna gracilis, also known as sweet gale, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Myricaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects that can help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as other health benefits like reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Dortmanna gracilis include volatile oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Dortmanna gracilis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, as well as being used in aromatherapy for its decongestant and expectorant properties.
